canonical_answer: A person wearing a white lab coat and purple nitrile gloves stands behind a table. Two clear plastic containers sit on the surface, one filled with light blue liquid. White absorbent pads are arranged on the right side near small bottles. The individual handles a silver spray device over the containers.

question: Describe the visual sequence from the opening graphics to the appearance of the demonstrator.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a black logo featuring a stylized flask appears; at 2s, instructional text is centered below the logos; at 8s, a person wearing a white lab coat over a striped shirt stands behind a table; at 12s, the person wears a light blue face mask near liquid containers.
